dsl_rule.translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction mapped to both long and short entries with identical volatility filters. 40-day moving average signal interpreted as price crossing sma_40. Low volatility filter (0.25) applied as entry condition; high volatility filter (1.60) triggers exit. hvol_20 used as volatility metric (20-period historical volatility in decimal scale). Exit condition inverted from entry: exit when volatility rises above threshold, consistent with 'avoid entry when high volatility is present' logic.

backtest_rule.reason: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction mapped to both long and short entries with identical volatility filters. 40-day moving average signal interpreted as price crossing sma_40. Low volatility filter (0.25) applied as entry condition; high volatility filter (1.60) triggers exit. hvol_20 used as volatility metric (20-period historical volatility in decimal scale). Exit condition inverted from entry: exit when volatility rises above threshold, consistent with 'avoid entry when high volatility is present' logic.

source_rule_text: Enter trades on a 40-day moving average signal when volatility is low (filter of 0.25) rather than high (filter of 1.60).
